eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 02:15 AM ON MAR 26, 2026 Effective until 10:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Gilbert Police Department is looking for 20 year old Rylee Huger.  Rylee is a white female, 5 feet 3 inches tall, 105 pounds, and has red hair with brown eyes.  She was last seen wearing a black t-shirt with a white M, jean shorts, black / white shoes and black prescription glasses with clear lenses.  Rylee was last seen at 3:40 PM on March 25, 2026, on foot near Higley and Queen Creek Roads in Gilbert, Arizona.  Rylee has a medical condition which may cause her to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen Rylee, please contact the Gilbert Police Department at 480-503-6500 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
